# ANALYSIS: Monitor ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE for OP-21 live J wins

**Filed:** 2026-06-18  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** watcher_proposal  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis
We need to accumulate 3 live J-confirmed wins for the ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE watcher to satisfy the OP-21 promotion gate and move to live trading. The ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE watcher is already deployed and generating signals; we monitor the engine's execution of these signals and record the outcome on any trading day (not limited to J source-of-truth days) until we have 3 wins, as per OP-21 gate requirements for watcher promotions.

## Mechanism
The ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE watcher is active in `watcher-observations.jsonl`. We will monitor the Alpaca paper trading account for trades triggered by ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE signals (confirmed by heartbeat entering a trade based on watcher observations). For each such trade, we record the P&L and date. We consider a trade a win if P&L > 0. We accumulate wins until we reach 3 wins. No changes to engine logic or parameters are made during monitoring; we are solely observing existing deployed watcher behavior.

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors
We are not changing engine behavior, so there is zero impact on J days during the monitoring period. The ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE watcher remains blocked by OP-21 (0/3 live J wins) and takes no trades on any day until the gate is satisfied.

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | 0 |
| 5/01 winner | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | 0 |
| 5/04 winner | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | 0 |
| 5/05 loser | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | 0 |
| 5/06 loser | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | 0 |
| 5/07 loser 1 | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | 0 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | No trade (OP-21 gate not met) | 0 |

(Note: Current and proposed behavior are identical during monitoring; delta is zero. Post-monitoring, once 3 live J wins are accumulated, the watcher will auto-deploy and begin trading—but this analysis covers only the monitoring phase.)

## OP-20 disclosures
1. **Account-size assumption:** Same as ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE candidate: qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper account uses 3 contracts minimum (~14% of headline qty).  
2. **Sample bias:** Same as ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE candidate: deduped N=32 unique bars from 16-month data, walk-forward and real-fills validated; no look-ahead bias.  
3. **Out-of-sample:** ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE candidate has WF PASS (OOS/IS=0.667, deduped N=32).  
4. **Real-fills:** ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE candidate has RF PASS (N=22 OPRA cases, WR=81.8%).  
5. **Failure modes:** Regime-dependent edge; loses in choppy/low-VIX markets or when ORB range >$2.00 filters out all signals. Worst-case scenario: consecutive losing narrow-ORB days due to unexpected intraday reversals.  
6. **Concentration:** Same as ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE candidate: Q2-2026 concentration = 16% (deduped); top-5 days = ~40% of P&L in raw data but deduped reduces concentration risk.

## Pre-merge gate
No code change required; gate is solely accumulation of 3 live J-confirmed wins via observation of existing ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE watcher output.

## Confidence
10 / 10 -- Monitoring the already-deployed watcher for live J wins is a straightforward, zero-risk operation to satisfy OP-21.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact
This analysis proposes no new candidate or change to existing candidates. It solely supports promotion of the existing ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE watcher (ranked #4, status PROMISING) by satisfying its OP-21 gate. No conflict with other candidates.
